And what I'm going to talk about tonight, some of the things that I've witnessed out there and seen, I think, has changed the way these animals have been peaceful, which now seems to be turning the other direction.
And I believe it has to do a lot with the way people have been out there and the way they've been basically treating the wildlife out there.
And I've noticed that they're getting more and more aggressive or protective of that area that I've been researching in.

I was able to take photographs and such as all this.
